name: naa-monorepo
description: Nasser Al Ali Enterprises - full-stack monorepo (React client + Node/Express server + SQLite)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.postinstall: test -d client/node_modules || npm --prefix client install && test -d server/node_modules || npm --prefix server install
